text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first race of the Classic Triple Crown, the
Satsuki Sho, is about to start when Fuji Kiseki
suddenly gets a phone call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She picks up to find herself greeted with cheers
from her dorm residents. She heads off for the
race, heart bolstered by their sweet surprise.
